// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: KeyLength
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{

    private static uint GetLength(string str) => (uint)str.Length;

    private static readonly int[] _offsets = {
        0, 1, 2
    };

    private static readonly int[] _values = {
        1, 2, 3
    };

    private static readonly string[] _keys = {
        "a", "aa", "aaa"
    };

    
    public static bool Contains(string key)
    {
        uint getLength;
        getLength = GetLength(key);
        if ((getLength < 1u))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if ((getLength > 3u))
        {
         return false;
        }



        int idx = key.Length - 1;
        return StringComparer.Ordinal.Equals(key, _keys[idx]);
    }
    
    public static bool TryLookup(string key, out int value)
    {
        uint getLength;
        getLength = GetLength(key);
        if ((getLength < 1u))
        {
         value = default;
         return false;
        }

        if ((getLength > 3u))
        {
         value = default;
         return false;
        }



        int idx = key.Length - 1;
        if (StringComparer.Ordinal.Equals(key, _keys[idx]))
        {
            value = _values[_offsets[idx]];
            return true;
        }

        value = default;
        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 3;
    public const int MinKeyLength = 1;
    public const int MaxKeyLength = 3;
    public const bool HasNumber = false;
    public const bool HasUppercase = false;
    public const bool HasLowercase = true;
    public const bool HasSymbol = false;
    public const bool HasWhitespace = false;
}
